creator: dbaio@freebsd.org
text:
Created attachment 172438
py-esmre.shar

Modules used to accelerate execution of a large collection
of regular expressions using the Aho-Corasick algorithms.

This port will be used as a dependency for security/w3af.

- portlint compliant
- poudriere tests ok FreeBSD 9.3|10.3|11 - i386|amd64
